description_long: This is a modern white minivan with a streamlined, boxy body and large, tinted windows on both sides, providing ample visibility and a spacious feel for passengers. The front features a wide windshield and a prominent grille, flanked by sleek headlights. The side profile reveals two sliding doors, flush with the body, and five-spoke alloy wheels. The rear is characterized by vertical taillights and a large rear window, offering good rearward visibility. The roof is smooth and unadorned, with no visible roof rack or rails. The overall design suggests a focus on passenger comfort, practicality, and urban utility.
description: A sleek, white modern minivan with large tinted windows, sliding side doors, and alloy wheels, designed for urban passenger transport.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, including two large sliding doors, tinted windows, and alloy wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide windshield, black grille, and sleek headlights.
description_view_2: Side view of the right profile, mirroring the left with sliding doors and large windows.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying vertical taillights, a large rear window, and a smooth, unadorned roof.
attribute_window_configuration: Large front windshield, two large side windows per side, small front quarter windows, and a single large rear window.
